user_query:
I'm preparing a four-session mini-unit on 19th‑century maritime poetry, and I want to pair each poem with a quote from my great‑great‑great‑grandfather’s 1847 logbook. Please plan and produce the following from the local inputs:

1) Select the readings:
- Use the constraints in input/course_constraints.yaml and the catalog in input/poems.csv.
- Filter poems to those where:
  • the 'themes' field contains 'Maritime' (case-insensitive substring),
  • year is within year_range (inclusive), and
  • lines <= max_lines_per_poem.
- Rank the filtered poems using these deterministic keys:
  • Primary: maritime_score (descending),
  • Tie-breaker 1: lines (ascending),
  • Tie-breaker 2: absolute difference from target_year (ascending),
  • Tie-breaker 3: title (alphabetical ascending).
- Choose the top number_of_sessions poems.
- Write the selection to outputs/reading_selection.csv with columns (in this order): rank, title, author, year, lines, themes, maritime_score, origin.

2) Extract and pair quotes from the logbook:
- From input/ancestor_log.txt, extract quotes only from lines that match the pattern: a leading date in square brackets [YYYY-MM-DD], followed by a space, then 'QUOTE:', a space, then a double-quoted sentence. Example: [1847-03-12] QUOTE: "...".
- From those quotes, keep only the ones that contain any keyword in course_constraints.yaml 'quote_keywords' (case-insensitive substring match).
- Sort the kept quotes by date ascending and take the first number_of_sessions.
- Pair Session i with the i-th poem from the ranked list and the i-th quote from the sorted list (1-based, in order).
- Save the pairings to outputs/session_pairs.json as a list of objects with fields: session (integer), poem_title (string), poem_year (integer), poem_lines (integer), quote_date (YYYY-MM-DD string), quote_text (string), keyword_matched (the first keyword found, lowercased).

3) Produce a brief human-readable plan:
- Create outputs/unit_plan.md that lists Session 1..number_of_sessions, each with the selected poem and its paired quote on the same line in this form: "Session X: {poem_title} ({year}, {lines} lines) — Quote {quote_date}: \"{quote_text}\"". Include one line per session in order.

All paths are relative to the workspace. Do not hardcode assumptions beyond what is in the inputs. The outputs should be fully reproducible from the provided files. All file paths are relative to the workspace directory.
